title: Lambdas should avoid having too many lines
description: Lambdas should not have too many linesAnalyze your codeadaptability-focusedmaintainabilityCode Smellsince-c++11Why is this an issue?Lambdas (introduced in C++11) are a very convenient and compact way to inject a behavior without having to create a dedicated function. But those lambdas should be used only if the behavior to be injected can be defined in a few lines of code, otherwise the source code can quickly become unreadable.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Lambda expression has too many lines and should be refactored into a separate function
